content.en:
This boundary river monument in Tongyang Mountain is the boundary river monument of fire.

The best boundary river monuments are naturally the time boundary river monument and the space boundary river monument, but the fire boundary river monument has been comprehended, with the origin of fire as the core, and then with the assistance of time and space and many daos, it can still create a good origin control technique.

In front of the boundary river monument.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged, visited the Enlightenment River Monument at close range, and silently comprehended the way of fire contained in the Upper Realm River Monument.

Although he has mastered the path of fire, it does not mean that he has mastered the infinite changes of the way of fire, and what is presented on the boundary river tablet is the infinite changes of the way of fire.

From the infinite changes, master the use of the way of fire, and only then can you hope to create the Origin Control Technique.

"According to the secret recorded in Wanyuan Mountain, it is useless to master one or two kinds of changes in any kind of Dao, it is useless to master one type of change, and only by mastering millions of changes can there be hope to create the Origin Control Technique, and only by mastering hundreds of millions of changes can you create the top Origin Control Technique. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And he controlled three thousand daos, but each dao controlled dozens or hundreds of changes at most, even if he combined three thousand daos, he couldn't create an origin control technique.

He also wants to master one Dao and master many changes, but every time he masters one more change, it takes an incomparably long time, and he doesn't know how many realms and rivers will be years later.

Therefore, everyone wants to obtain the Boundary River Monument, so that they can grasp the changes more quickly.

Ye Tian silently comprehended this boundary river monument of Tongyang Mountain, and has been comprehending.

With the passage of time, he mastered the changes of a way of planting fire one by one, and this efficiency was tens of thousands of times faster than his usual silent comprehension.

A thousand!

10,000 kinds!

50,000 kinds!

100,000 kinds!

Ye Tian's mastery of the way of fire has changed more and more, and all the changes are in his own heart, and he has vaguely gained experience in the creation of the origin control technique.

Of course.

Ye Tian had to at least master a million fire path changes before he could try to create an origin control technique.

In the blink of an eye.

Ye Tian had already comprehended the 200,000 Realm River Years, which was also a long time for him.

And on this day, Ye Tian could be regarded as having finally mastered a million changes in the way of fire, but the further he went, the more difficult it was to master one more change.

As you can imagine, it is terrifying to want to master 100 million changes.

"Forget it, in a short period of time, it would be quite good to be able to create an Origin Control Technique!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Now, Ye Tian has mastered a million changes in the way of fire, and he is ready to use the way of fire as the core, combined with other paths, to create an origin control technique.

This time, he didn't pursue the power of the Origin Control Technique, as long as he created it, it would be considered a success.

After all, this is just the beginning, an attempt, and the requirements can't be too high.

With the existence of the secret of enlightenment, Ye Tian not only participated in the many changes in the path of enlightenment fire with a fast efficiency, but also created the origin control technique naturally easier than others.

Now that he has mastered the millions of variations of the way of fire, it is only a matter of time before he is 100% sure that he will create the Origin Control Technique.

One boundary river year after another has passed, and about 80,000 boundary river years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created an Origin Control Technique.

In a cultivation space-time in Tongyang Mountain, Ye Tian waved his hand, and a fire-colored light struck, shattering many space-times, and the terrifying spread to the depths of infinite space-time.

Thundered!!!

The power of this blow was too terrifying, and the scope of the impact was also very fast.

"Flameburst!"

This is the name of this origin control technique created by Ye Tian, and its strength is naturally very terrifying, surpassing any time and space control technique created by Ye Tian in the past.

And with the creation of this control technique, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, and he directly stepped from the eight-domain level controller to the first-realm level controller realm.

Although his current strength is at the lowest level among the first-realm level controllers, he is indeed a first-realm level controller, above the nine-domain level controllers.

The Tongyang Pagoda was inspired by Ye Tian's creation of an Origin Control Technique, and he was immediately extremely surprised.

All this time, it has been keeping an eye on its new owner.

Obviously, Ye Tian didn't know the Origin Control Technique at all before, and he didn't even have much control over the changes in the Way of Fire, but after obtaining the Fire Boundary River Monument, he created the Origin Control Technique in a short period of time.

In its eyes, a mere hundreds of thousands of river years can indeed only be described in a short period of time.

"This new master's talent is too demonic, I don't know how many times more demonic than the previous master, if the previous master also has such a talent, it is estimated that he will not fall!" Tongyang Pagoda Instrument Spirit thought.

Ye Tian's talent is so demonic, it is not a shame to become the instrument spirit of such a powerhouse.

After thinking about it like this, the mentality of Tongyang Pagoda Instrument Spirit changed.

......

After creating the Origin Control Technique of Flame Explosion, it would be difficult for Ye Tian to create a second Origin Control Technique, unless he obtained other Boundary River Monuments, continued to improve on the many changes in other Daos, and controlled more than a million changes.

However, there is an element of luck in his ability to obtain this Boundary River Monument, and it is much more difficult to obtain other Boundary River Monuments.

"I haven't gone to the other places that the fourth senior sister gave me at the beginning, I can go and see them, and maybe I can get a boundary river monument!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he left Tongyang Mountain and went to other locations.

However, before leaving Tongyang Mountain, he dispersed this body and recondensed his replica body.

He didn't want to become the master of Tongyang, and then be studied by the powerhouses in the Origin Realm Sea.

Others think that he is a disguise, but he even has the same soul breath and origin, which is not explained by disguise.

Anyway, he has completely controlled the magic circle of Tongyang Mountain, even the Tongyang Pagoda Weapon Spirit can't interfere, so he can go to Tongyang Mountain in his own appearance in the future.

After spending some time and resources to recondense and copy his body, Ye Tian entered the Origin Realm Sea again and went to the second location given by the Fourth Senior Sister.

At this time, no one knew that Ye Tian had left Tongyang Mountain, and they were still waiting silently, trying to find out Ye Tian's true identity.

It is conceivable that they are afraid that they will not be able to find out Ye Tian's identity for a long time, unless Ye Tian takes the initiative to go to Tongyang Mountain with a copy of his body and voluntarily reveals his identity.
